creator: sumikawa@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

>  1.  I've been unable to retrieve this updated file from your web server 
>      for the past 4 days.  Whilst the machine appears to be pingable, 
>      all attempts to talk to port 80 are just timing out. 

>  2.  In addition, since you control the sources, a more appropriate 
>      change would be to bump the version number to, say, 
>      mp3rename-0.4.1.tar.gz, and send in the appropriate updates 
>      to both the Makefile and files/md5. 

> If you can fix [1] (and, preferably, [2] as well), we can make some 
> progress on this. 

Sorry, I missed this PR. 

I've fixed files/md5 since I can get mp3rename-0.4.tar.gz from the web 
server. 

I close this PR once. Sander, if you fix [2], please submit new PR.
